name: Wesfarmers Limited
analysis: WES's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 3% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$87.1100. Trade idea: entry A$90.7400, stop A$81.6255, target A$118.0835 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
